name: The bite
description: The infection carried by a zombie's bite — the spine of the health model, and the clearest expression of 'infection is identity, not a countdown' (GDD VI). It advances through hidden stages the player learns to read from symptoms alone, never a bar. Reaching terminal opens a cure race, not a loss screen (FR-INJ-08); the run ends by infection only if that race is neglected. This file mirrors the engine's authoritative dials in sim/infection.ts; a harness drift-guard keeps them identical.

stages.label: symptomatic
stages.symptom: You feel feverish — a wound throbs with a heat that isn't healing, and a fine tremor runs through your hands.
stages.sign: the sheen of fever on you

stages.label: advanced
stages.symptom: The fever has burrowed deep. Sounds come from nowhere and shapes cross the edge of your sight — you can no longer trust your own senses.
stages.sign: the grey, sweating look of the badly infected

stages.label: terminal
stages.symptom: You are burning up and failing — thoughts swimming, time slipping, and you can no longer tell what is real. And yet you are still here, still moving.
stages.sign: the hollow, dying look of someone the infection has almost taken

notes: Stage keys/order, symptom, sign, cure (amount/partial/certaintyPercent = round(certainty*100)), and quarantine mirror sim/infection.ts INFECTION_STAGES + CURE_BY_STAGE + QUARANTINE_BY_STAGE exactly; docs/qa/QA_REVIEW_M4_PART5.md records the pairing. Non-bite sources (wound/tainted-water/spoiled-food/blood) are authored later against the same staged machine (T51).
